entities.name: HWREQCHK_CPU_VENDOR
entities.description: 枚举(hwreqchkapi.h) 指示 CPU 供应商。某些信息与预发行产品相关，该产品在商业发布之前可能会进行重大修改。对于此处提供的信息，Microsoft 不作任何明示或暗示的担保。

entities.name: HWREQCHK_PRODUCT_TYPE
entities.description: 枚举类型 (hwreqchkapi.h)，用于指示产品类型以确定要检查的硬件要求集。注意：某些信息与预发行产品相关，在商业发布前可能进行实质性修改。

entities.name: HWREQCHK_TARGET_RELEASE
entities.description: Enumeration specifying the target release type for hardware requirement checks

members.name: TargetRelease
members.description: 一个 HWREQCHK_TARGET_RELEASE 值，该值指示所检查的设备的目标版本。 ProductType 一个HWREQCHK_PRODUCT_TYPE值，该值指示所检查的设备的产品类型。 Revision 硬件要求的修订号。

entities.name: EvaluateHardwareRequirement
entities.description: Evaluates a specific hardware requirement and returns pass/fail result indicating whether the device meets the requirement. Works in conjunction with GetHardwareRequirements (returns defined hardware requirements collection) and GetHardwareRequirementSystemInfo (provides actual hardware info for comparison).

entities.name: HWREQCHK_DEVICE_HARDWARE_EVALUATION
entities.description: 表示已计算的单个约束。在内部，API使用CoTaskMemAlloc为此参数分配内存，调用方负责释放内存。

parameters.name: hardwareRequirement
parameters.description: 指定要对其进行评估的单个特定要求。 evaluationResult 计算结果。 如果设备满足硬件要求，则返回 值 TRUE ;否则，值为 FALSE 。 constraintsEvaluated 一个可选 out 值，返回用于评估特定 hardwareRequirement 的约束列表。 数组中的每个

entities.name: HWREQCHK_DEVICE_HARDWARE_REQUIREMENT
entities.description: Specifies the latest defined hardware requirements for a given product type. Each product type enumeration value can have one or more OS versions associated with hardware requirements.

parameters.name: deviceHardwareRequirements
parameters.description: 返回所有定义的硬件要求的列表。 返回的任何硬件要求都可用于评估硬件要求。７ 备注 在内部，API 使用 CoTaskMemAlloc 为此参数分配内存，调用方负责使用

return_value.description: 返回一个 HRESULT 值，该值指示调用是成功还是失败。

entities.name: HWREQCHK_DEVICE_HARDWARE_SYSINFO
entities.description: 包含设备硬件和系统信息的数据结构，用于硬件要求检查。

parameters.name: deviceHardwareSystemInfo
parameters.description: 提供用于根据定义的硬件要求进行评估的当前设备硬件和处理器信息。

return_value.description: 返回一个 HRESULT 值，该值指示调用成功或失败。

entities.name: HWREQCHK_CPU_VENDOR_OTHER
entities.description: Represents CPU vendors other than AMD or Intel

entities.name: HWREQCHK_CPU_VENDOR_QUALCOMM
entities.description: CPU由高通制造。定义在hwreqchkapi.h头文件中

entities.name: HWREQCHK_CPU_VENDOR_AMD
entities.description: CPU 由 AMD 制造。

entities.name: HWREQCHK_CPU_VENDOR_INTEL
entities.description: 标识CPU由Intel制造的常量值

entities.name: HWREQCHK_MAX_HARDWARE_RULE_NAME
entities.description: Maximum length for hardware rule names.

entities.name: IsLatestRequirementForProductType
entities.description: 指示硬件要求是否为当前产品类型的最新修订版。RequirementName的最大大小为64，由HWREQCHK_MAX_HARDWARE_REQUIREMENT_NAME定义。

entities.name: CpuFamily
entities.description: CPU系列标识符

entities.name: HWREQCHK_MAX_PROPERTY_VALUE
entities.description: 指定产品名称属性的最大长度值，定义为256

entities.name: HWREQCHK_PRODUCT_INVALID
entities.description: Invalid product type for hardware requirement checking

entities.name: HWREQCHK_PRODUCT_IOTENTERPRISE
entities.description: 该产品是企业 IoT 设备。HWREQCHK_PRODUCT_IOT 该产品是 IoT 设备。Header: hwreqchkapi.h

entities.name: HWREQCHK_TARGET_RELEASE_WIN11_VNEXT
entities.description: Windows 11 vNext release target for hardware requirement checks

entities.name: HWREQCHK_TARGET_RELEASE_WIN11_21H2
entities.description: Specifies Windows 11 version 21H2 as the target release version for hardware requirement checks.

entities.name: HWREQCHK_TARGET_RELEASE_WIN11_22H2
entities.description: Specifies Windows 11 version 22H2 as the target release version.

entities.name: HWREQCHK_TARGET_RELEASE_SRV2022_21H2
entities.description: Target release version constant for Windows Server 2022 version 21H2.
